structured_tensions.tension_text: Storytelling-frameworks conflicts with algorithmic-thinking when narrative flow displaces the stepwise structure needed to test and execute a process.
structured_tensions.source_quote: storytelling-frameworks conflicts with algorithmic-thinking (algorithmic thinking) when algorithmic Thinking emphasizes structured, logical processes, which may conflict with the more narrative and emotional approach of Storytelling Frameworks.

structured_tensions.tension_text: Storytelling-frameworks conflicts with formal-reasoning when subjective interpretation starts carrying argumentative weight that should belong to logic and evidence.
structured_tensions.source_quote: storytelling-frameworks conflicts with formal-reasoning (formal reasoning) when formal Reasoning relies on strict logic and evidence, potentially opposing the subjective and interpretive nature of storytelling.

structured_tensions.tension_text: Storytelling-frameworks conflicts with first-principles-thinking when a coherent story is mistaken for a reconstructed causal foundation.
structured_tensions.source_quote: storytelling-frameworks conflicts with first-principles-thinking (first principles thinking) when a compelling narrative arc substitutes for base-rate reasoning, causing practitioners to accept the story's internal causal logic without examining whether the foundational assumptions would survive reconstruction from first principles.

curation_notes.summary: Preserved only current-vocabulary first-order seams that were explicit or cleanly warranted by the raw source.
donor_drops: Did not keep donor-shaped or out-of-vocabulary relation surfaces; omission beat weak forcing.
open_questions: Higher-order candidates remain observational only and belong in later selective review rather than in this closure batch.

allies: Wave 4 candidacy remains observational only for this model.
antagonists: Any broader antagonistic surface not preserved here was omitted because the current first-order vocabulary did not justify forcing it.
structured_tensions: Only explicit or cleanly source-supported tensions that survive current-vocabulary discipline were preserved.
